summary: Final verification of Ariadne Editorial Studio - All features tested and working correctly. Backend: 6/6 key endpoints verified (100%). Frontend: All requested UI/UX features verified successfully across Studio and Scuola areas.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the latest round verified working: Studio dark theme with readable sidebar, Scuola light theme, Il mio percorso with 4 tabs (Formazione Coach ICF, Coach tecnica, Coach business, Credenziali ICF), 10 courses across 3 categories, ACC/PCC/MCC credential tracking, Community feed with images on first 3 posts, Course detail pages with full content.

studio_area.dark_theme: PASS - data-area='studio' applies dark CSS with blue-purple accents
studio_area.sidebar_readability: PASS - White text on dark background is readable
studio_area.sidebar_menu_items: PASS - Dashboard, Avvia produzione contenuti, Produzione guidata, Approvazioni, Esporta per pubblicazione, Corsi ed eventi, Editoriale, Repository, Regole, Profili social, Agenti
studio_area.stat_cards_clickable: PASS - All 4 stat cards (bozza, generati, esportati, campagne) are clickable
studio_area.no_blank_screen: PASS - Dashboard loads with all content visible

scuola_area.light_theme: PASS - data-area='school' applies light CSS with yellow-green accents
scuola_area.sidebar_menu_community: PASS - Dashboard, Il mio percorso, Bacheca della Community, Materiali, Eventi e annunci, Ariadne AI
scuola_area.sidebar_menu_gestione: PASS - Inbox, Regole smistamento, Template email, Utenti, Edizioni e materiali, Banner consigli
scuola_area.onboarding_modal_handling: PASS - Modal can be completed without blocking app flow

il_mio_percorso.page_title: PASS - Shows 'Il mio percorso' as page title
il_mio_percorso.four_tabs: PASS - Shows Formazione Coach ICF, Coach tecnica, Coach business, Credenziali ICF
il_mio_percorso.status_change_functionality: PASS - Course status can be changed via API (not_started -> in_progress -> completed)

credenziali_icf.acc_card: PASS - ACC (Associate Certified Coach) card present with progress tracking
credenziali_icf.pcc_card: PASS - PCC (Professional Certified Coach) card present with progress tracking
credenziali_icf.mcc_card: PASS - MCC (Master Certified Coach) card present with progress tracking
credenziali_icf.expandable_cards: PASS - Credential cards can be expanded to show detailed requirements

bacheca_della_community.page_title: PASS - Shows 'Bacheca della Community' as title
bacheca_della_community.post_composer: PASS - Post input with 'Aggiungi foto' button and 'Pubblica' button
bacheca_della_community.first_3_posts_with_images: PASS - All first 3 posts have visible Unsplash images
bacheca_della_community.trainer_badges: PASS - Posts from trainers show 'Trainer' badge
bacheca_della_community.like_comment_buttons: PASS - Mi piace and Commenta buttons visible on posts

course_detail_page.hero_section: PASS - Course title, subtitle, description visible
course_detail_page.quick_info_cards: PASS - Duration, next edition, location, max participants shown
course_detail_page.credenziale_certificazione: PASS - ACC credential info with description
course_detail_page.foto_edizioni: PASS - 3 photos from previous editions displayed
course_detail_page.cta_buttons: PASS - 'Prenota una chiamata' and 'Il mio percorso' CTAs present

backend_endpoints.community_feed: PASS - GET /api/community/feed returns 11 posts with images
backend_endpoints.community_dashboard: PASS - Includes banners, events, recent posts

mocked_functionality.credential_tracking: MOCKED - ICF credential progress is stored in localStorage, not backend
mocked_functionality.course_detail_content: MOCKED - Some course details (testimonials, schedule) are static frontend content
